name: aionis
description: Private runtime mainline for Aionis execution-memory, governance, replay, and learning internals.

scripts.build: npm run -s build:runtime-host && npm run -s runtime-core:build && npm run -s sdk:build && npm run -s full-sdk:build && npm run -s build:app:lite
scripts.test:lite: node --test scripts/ci/lite-startup-contract.test.mjs scripts/ci/lite-source-scope.test.mjs scripts/ci/lite-release-baseline.test.mjs && npx tsx --test scripts/ci/lite-automation-kernel.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-health-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-error-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-replay-repair-policy.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-replay-governed-learning-projection-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-memory-governance-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-anchor-rehydration-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-anchor-rehydration-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-tools-select-route-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-pattern-suppress-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-runtime-tool-hints.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-planning-summary.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-replay-anchor.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-replay-learning-projection.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-tools-pattern-anchor.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-shared-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-promote-memory-governance-shared-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-form-pattern-governance-shared-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-operation-runner-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-decision-trace-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-policy-effect-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-runtime-apply-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-runtime-provider-builder.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-provider-factory.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-model-client-factory.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-model-client-http.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-model-client-http-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-adjudication-modules.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-context-build.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-context-runtime-packet-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-execution-native-write-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-execution-introspection-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-workflow-write-projection-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-memory-write-workflow-projection-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-handoff-workflow-projection-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-session-event-workflow-projection-route.test.ts
